user.description: Enter your PoolCopilot API key to connect to your PoolCop system.

flow_rates.title: Pump Flow Configuration
flow_rates.description: Your pool has {pump_speeds} speed levels and a volume of {vol} m³. Configure flow rates (m³/h) for each pump speed level that your system supports.

set_pump_speed.name: Set pump speed
set_pump_speed.description: Sets the pool pump speed to a specific level.

toggle_pump.name: Toggle pump
toggle_pump.description: Toggles the pool pump on or off.

toggle_aux.name: Toggle auxiliary
toggle_aux.description: Toggles an auxiliary output on or off.

set_valve_position.name: Set valve position
set_valve_position.description: Sets the valve to a specific position.

set_force_filtration.name: Set forced filtration
set_force_filtration.description: Sets the pool to forced filtration mode for a specific duration.

configure_pump_flow.name: Configure pump flow
configure_pump_flow.description: Configures flow rates (m³/h) for different pump speeds to calculate actual flow.

speed_1.name: Speed 1 Flow
speed_1.description: Flow rate (m³/h) when pump is at speed level 1.

speed_2.name: Speed 2 Flow
speed_2.description: Flow rate (m³/h) when pump is at speed level 2.

speed_3.name: Speed 3 Flow
speed_3.description: Flow rate (m³/h) when pump is at speed level 3.
